Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need construct Log Skeleton dictionary for order fulfillment process described Need determine constraints based on logical process flow

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Process Order arrives check availability reserve items pick items quality check pack order generate shipping label dispatch invoice customer record payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Typical flow RO to CA to RI to PI to QC to PO to GSL to D to IC to RP

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus directly follows pairs RO CA CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D D IC IC RP

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For a linear process each activity occurs exactly 1 time So activ freq for each activity is 1

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Always before should contain pairs where a later activity implies an earlier one happened before and always after should contain pairs where an earlier activity implies a later one happens after

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For linear chain always after should contain all pairs where one activity precedes another in the flow and always before should contain the reverse pairs

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In this process all activities should coexist so never together is empty set

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Equivalence might be empty or could include some pairs but leaving it empty is reasonable if no special equivalence beyond the single sequence is intended

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The dictionary should contain the exact keys equivalence always before always after never together activ freq directly follows

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I will construct the final dictionary with activ freq each activity 1 directly follows as the chain always after as all forward precedence pairs always before as all reverse precedence pairs never together empty and equivalence empty
